'''Audio Performance Incorporated''' was a manufacturing corporation which produced a variety of equipment. Among its products were [[disruption bubble generator]]s such as the [[Sheer Silence Bubble Generator]],<ref name="ROE" /> the [[No-Show]],<ref name="AEG" /> and the [[Thunderhead Portable Entertainment System]].<ref name="FH" />
